\tzpentry{ID3475}{Pi Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3475 introduces Pi Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ e^{i(\pi+\theta)} \;=\; e^{i\pi} e^{i\theta} \;=\; -\,e^{i\theta}. \]
